for item in data:
    slug = item[&#34;slug&#34;]

    if not p.exists():
        missing.append(slug)
        continue
    text = p.read_text()
    m = re.search(r&#34;^key_concept: \|\n((?:  .*\n)+)&#34;, text, re.M)
    if not m:
        mismatch.append((slug, &#34;no key_concept&#34;))
        continue
    bullets = [ln[2:] for ln in m.group(1).splitlines() if ln.startswith(&#34;  - &#34;)]

    # find level bullets in file
    level_bullets = [b for b in bullets if b.startswith(&#34;Level &#34;)]

        mismatch.append((slug, f&#34;levels differ: file has {len(level_bullets)} levels&#34;))

        mismatch.append((slug, &#34;b1 differs&#34;))

        # check rest after levels
        rest_in_file = bullets[6:] if len(bullets) &gt; 6 else []
        if rest_in_file != item[&#34;rest&#34;]:
            mismatch.append((slug, f&#34;rest differs: file {len(rest_in_file)} vs json {len(item[&#39;rest&#39;])}&#34;))
print(f&#34;total: {len(data)}&#34;)
print(f&#34;missing files: {len(missing)}&#34;)
print(f&#34;mismatch: {len(mismatch)}&#34;)
for s, why in mismatch[:10]:
    print(f&#34;  {s}: {why}&#34;)
if len(mismatch) &gt; 10:
    print(f&#34;  ... and {len(mismatch)-10} more&#34;)
PY</summary>
```bash
python3 << 'PY'
import json, re, pathlib
root = pathlib.Path("/home/jorap/Documents/GitHub/jorap.com")
data = json.loads((root / "data/wider-levels-batch-5.json").read_text())
mismatch = []
missing = []
for item in data:
    slug = item["slug"]
    p = root / f"content/english/notes/{slug}.md"
    if not p.exists():
        missing.append(slug)
        continue
    text = p.read_text()
    m = re.search(r"^key_concept: \|\n((?:  .*\n)+)", text, re.M)
    if not m:
        mismatch.append((slug, "no key_concept"))
        continue
    bullets = [ln[2:] for ln in m.group(1).splitlines() if ln.startswith("  - ")]
    expected_levels = item["levels"]
    # find level bullets in file
    level_bullets = [b for b in bullets if b.startswith("Level ")]
    if level_bullets != expected_levels:
        mismatch.append((slug, f"levels differ: file has {len(level_bullets)} levels"))
    elif bullets[0] != item["b1"]:
        mismatch.append((slug, "b1 differs"))
    elif bullets[6:6+len(item["rest"])] != item["rest"] and bullets[1+5:1+5+len(item["rest"])] != item["rest"]:
        # check rest after levels
        rest_in_file = bullets[6:] if len(bullets) > 6 else []
        if rest_in_file != item["rest"]:
            mismatch.append((slug, f"rest differs: file {len(rest_in_file)} vs json {len(item['rest'])}"))
print(f"total: {len(data)}")
print(f"missing files: {len(missing)}")
print(f"mismatch: {len(mismatch)}")
for s, why in mismatch[:10]:
    print(f"  {s}: {why}")
if len(mismatch) > 10:
    print(f"  ... and {len(mismatch)-10} more")
PY
```

```
  slow-productivity: levels differ: file has 0 levels

  spaced-repetition: levels differ: file has 0 levels

  stay-effective-in-new-conditions: levels differ: file has 0 levels
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="run_terminal_command_v2"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **run_terminal_command_v2** • Run command: python3 &lt;&lt; &#39;PY&#39;
import json, re, pathlib
root = pathlib.Path(&#34;/home/jorap/Documents/GitHub/jorap.com&#34;)
data = json.loads((root / &#34;data/wider-levels-batch-5.json&#34;).read_text())

def extract_key_concept(text):
    m = re.search(r&#39;^key_concept: \|\n&#39;, text, re.M)
    if not m:
        return None, None
    start = m.end()
    rest = text[start:]
    lines = []
    for line in rest.splitlines():
        if line and not line.startswith(&#39;  &#39;):
            break
        lines.append(line)
    return lines, start + len(&#39;\n&#39;.join(lines))

def bullet_text(line):
    if line.startswith(&#39;  - &#39;):
        return line[4:]
    if line.startswith(&#39;  &#39;):
        return line[2:]  # bible/blank continuation
    return None

for item in data[:3]:
    slug = item[&#39;slug&#39;]
    text = (root / f&#34;content/english/notes/{slug}.md&#34;).read_text()
    lines, _ = extract_key_concept(text)
    bullets = [bullet_text(l) for l in lines if l.startswith(&#39;  - &#39;)]
    levels = [b for b in bullets if b and b.startswith(&#39;Level &#39;)]
    print(slug, &#39;bullets&#39;, len(bullets), &#39;levels&#39;, len(levels))
    print(&#39;  L1 match:&#39;, levels[0] == item[&#39;levels&#39;][0] if levels else &#39;NO LEVELS&#39;)
PY</summary>
```bash
python3 << 'PY'
import json, re, pathlib
root = pathlib.Path("/home/jorap/Documents/GitHub/jorap.com")
data = json.loads((root / "data/wider-levels-batch-5.json").read_text())

def extract_key_concept(text):
    m = re.search(r'^key_concept: \|\n', text, re.M)
    if not m:
        return None, None
    start = m.end()
    rest = text[start:]
    lines = []
    for line in rest.splitlines():
        if line and not line.startswith('  '):
            break
        lines.append(line)
    return lines, start + len('\n'.join(lines))

def bullet_text(line):
    if line.startswith('  - '):
        return line[4:]
    if line.startswith('  '):
        return line[2:]  # bible/blank continuation
    return None

for item in data[:3]:
    slug = item['slug']
    text = (root / f"content/english/notes/{slug}.md").read_text()
    lines, _ = extract_key_concept(text)
    bullets = [bullet_text(l) for l in lines if l.startswith('  - ')]
    levels = [b for b in bullets if b and b.startswith('Level ')]
    print(slug, 'bullets', len(bullets), 'levels', len(levels))
    print('  L1 match:', levels[0] == item['levels'][0] if levels else 'NO LEVELS')
PY
```

```
situational-control bullets 8 levels 5
  L1 match: True

  L1 match: True
slow-the-moment bullets 9 levels 5
  L1 match: True

```
